reasoning: Multiple authoritative gaming news sources (IGN, GameSpot, Polygon, Kotaku) confirm that Rockstar Games and Take-Two Interactive have officially delayed Grand Theft Auto VI. Previously scheduled for Fall 2025, the game is now slated for release on May 26, 2026. Given the official announcement of the delay to 2026, a 2025 release is virtually impossible, as large-scale AAA game delays are essentially never reversed. The probability is set to the minimum allowed value to reflect near certainty.
